title: Epipactis caudata
taxonomy: I found that Epipactis caudata, commonly known as the long-leaved helleborine, is classified in the kingdom Plantae, and more specifically within the family Orchidaceae. This orchid is native to Europe and Asia, and is often found in woodland environments. It is a terrestrial orchid with long, thin stems and greenish-yellow flowers.
uses: Epipactis caudata, also known as the bearded helleborine, has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. intro: Epipactis caudata, commonly known as the Tailored Helleborine, is a species of orchid native to Europe and parts of Asia.
